content.problemStatement:
You are teaching a class of NNN students. Today, during the morning prayer, all the students are standing in a line. You are given a string sss with length NNN; for each valid iii, the iii-th character of this string is 'b' if the iii-th student in the line is a boy or 'g' if this student is a girl.

The awkwardness of this configuration of students is defined as the sum of pairwise distances between each boy and girl. The distance between the iii-th and jjj-th student in the line is ŌłŻiŌłÆjŌłŻ|i - j|ŌłŻiŌłÆjŌłŻ. Formally, the awkwardness is Ōłæi=1NŌĆēŌłæj=i+1sjŌēĀsiN(jŌłÆi)ŌĆē.\sum\limits_{i=1}^N \, \sum\limits_{j=i+1\\ s_j \neq s_i}^N (j - i)\,.i=1ŌłæNŌĆŗj=i+1sjŌĆŗŅĆĀ=siŌĆŗŌłæNŌĆŗ(jŌłÆi).

As the teacher, it is your responsibility to reorder the students in such a way that the awkwardness of the resulting configuration is the smallest possible. You may reorder the students in the line in any way you want. Find the minimum awkwardness that can be achieved.
constraints: each character of sss is either 'b' or 'g'
the sum of ŌłŻsŌłŻ|s|ŌłŻsŌłŻ over all test cases does not exceed 4Ōŗģ1064 \cdot 10^64Ōŗģ106
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single string sss.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer - the minimum possible awkwardness.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The total awkwardness is ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ=1|1 - 0| = 1ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ=1, no matter how you arrange the students.
Example case 2: Initially, the awkwardness is ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ+ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ=1+2=3|1 - 0| + |2 - 0| = 1 + 2 = 3ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ+ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ=1+2=3. However, you can move the boy between the two girls, i.e. choose the configuration "gbg". Here, the awkwardness is ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ+ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1+1=2|1 - 0| + |2 - 1| = 1 + 1 = 2ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ0ŌłŻ+ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1+1=2.
